title: Return To The Forest
description:
A museum, a heist and a magical forest that comes alive through dance, puppetry and play – inviting us to reflect on what we treasure and how we connect…

Precious treasures are on display in a museum, but remember – strictly no touching! Dusk falls, and the museum is getting ready to close, but something is beginning to stir. Only a few visitors remain. These precious objects seem to call to them, yearning to be freed… Is this a heist happening in front of your eyes? Can it really be a heist when the objects are leading the way?

Celebrating their 30th birthday in 2026, Theatre-Rites are renowned for creating playful and meaningful productions for children and adults alike. For Return to the Forest, they collaborate once again with the award-winning South African Choreographer Gregory Maqoma.

Led by Maqoma’s high-energy movement and the magical puppetry of Director Sue Buckmaster (Chotto Desh), Return to the Forest journeys from a museum into the heart of a wild and magical forest, full of life and wonder. Who will we meet along the way?

After captivating audiences across the world, these incredible artists will team up for an playful and thought-provoking encounter. Combining dance and puppetry to dazzling effect, Return to the Forest is an invitation to imagine what is precious and how we care for it.

“Theatre-Rites, a company of genuine originality and flair” The Guardian

A Theatre-Rites and Factory International co-production, co-commissioned by Sadler’s Wells. Created as an immersive production for Manchester and London and adapted by Theatre-Rites for Blackpool Grand’s stage

title: Think Floyd
description:
Think Floyd’s exciting new 2026 production features The Dark Side of the Moon and Wish You Were Here—two of the most iconic and influential albums of all time.

Both will be performed in their entirety, alongside a rich selection of classic Pink Floyd tracks, spanning from the Syd Barrett era to The Division Bell.

More than just a tribute act, Think Floyd are known for their stunning musicianship, authentic sound, and meticulous attention to detail. Their performances capture the essence of Pink Floyd with passion and precision, supported by an immersive laser light show that elevates the concert into a true audiovisual experience.

Even Pink Floyd’s own Nick Mason has praised them, calling Think Floyd “brilliant” and remarking in an LBC interview that they’re “better than we are.” With such acclaim and dedication to the craft, Think Floyd’s 2026 tour promises a must-see experience for fans old and new.

If you love Entertainment, see what else we have coming to Blackpool Grand Theatre this season HERE.

title: AVR Dance Show
description:
AVR is thrilled to be back with their fourth yearly appearance at The Grand Theatre.

After a hugely successful run the previous three years, AVR is excited to present another high energy show, packed full of more than 150 talented students from both the Dance and Theatre school, showcasing a mixture of Dancing, Singing and Acting.

‘The Show’ is a compilation of excerpts from much loved musicals including, Hercules, High School Musical, Shrek and Descendants in addition to Swan Lake and a story of life told through David Bowie’s greatest hits.

The perfect experience for any musical, dance or drama lover or budding youngster that loves to dance and sing.

title: Heritage Tour & Afternoon Tea – 5th July 2026
description:
Explore the Magic of The Grand

Be guided through the stunning Blackpool Grand Theatre by our knowledgeable Heritage Guides. Discover fascinating stories, hidden gems, and architectural marvels as you journey through this historic masterpiece. Learn about the theatre’s vibrant past, its artistic legacy, and the vision of its renowned architect, Frank Matcham.

An Afternoon of Elegance

After the tour, step onto The Stage for a delightful Afternoon Tea. Savor delicious treats and fine teas while seated on The Stage.

A Unique and Memorable Experience

This is more than just a tour; it’s a journey through time, a celebration of heritage, and an afternoon of indulgence. Whether you’re a theatre enthusiast, a history buff, or simply looking for a unique experience, our Theatre Tours and Afternoon Tea offer something truly special.

Afternoon tea on stands and served to each table.

Cucumber sandwiches

Cream cheese & black pepper sandwiches

Cheese and pickle sandwiches

Honey roasted ham and wholegrain mustard sandwiches

Handmade sausage rolls

Pork Pies

Selection of quiches

Fruit scones

Victoria sponge cake

Macaroons

Tea and coffee and vintage teacups and saucers

Vegan/vegetarian option available on request.

Please Note: Each table has 10 seats, and unless you purchase all the seating on the table, you will be sharing the table with other customers.

Book your tickets now and step into the enchanting world of Blackpool Grand Theatre!

Cant make this date? See all available tour dates HERE

Why not make your afternoon extra special by adding a glass of fizz for just an extra £6pp.

title: Preston Dance College Summer Showcase
description:
Experience an electrifying evening of dance as Preston College Dance (PCD) present their summer showcase ‘Fragments’. This dynamic performance brings together dancers studying on the Dance Performance and Teaching Diploma course, and on the BA (Hons) Dance Performance, Teaching and Choreography programme. There is a vibrant programme of Commercial, Contemporary, Jazz, Lyrical, Musical Theatre, Ballet and more.

Each piece represents a fragment of the artistic journey our students undertake during their training. Choreographed by members of the PCD faculty alongside an exciting range of guest choreographers, the showcase highlights the diverse voices and creative approaches that shape the PCD experience.

Bold, expressive and full of energy, ‘Fragments’ offers a powerful snapshot of emerging talent and the passion that drives the next generation of dance artists. Join us for an inspiring celebration of movement, creativity and performance.

title: IT’S NOT A GAME – Starring award-winning Illusionists Jay & Joss
description:
Jay & Joss are the award-winning illusionists who stunned the judges on Britain’s Got Talent. Now they’re back with a mind-bending new show – a chance to sit back and leave real life behind!

It’s Not a Game invites you into a world where nothing is quite as it seems.

With jawdropping stunts, breathtaking visuals and moments that defy belief, reality and illusion are about to dissolve.

Can you be sure where one ends and the other begins?

Fresh from Britain’s Got Talent and Penn & Teller’s Fool Us, acclaimed magic duo Jay & Joss are now thrilling audiences all over the world.

Celebrated as “spectacular” (Entertainment Daily) and “awe-inspiring” (OK Magazine), they’re also known to millions as “the boys who made Simon Cowell believe in magic.”

If you love Entertainment, see what else we have coming to Blackpool Grand Theatre this season.

title: 80s Live
description:
You’ve made it through the wilderness, somehow, you’ve made it through and now we’re never gonna give you up!

Get ready as we bring you – direct from The Adelphi Theatre in London’s West End – the biggest 80s party show to tour the UK – 80s Live!

We will make you feel shiny and new as we travel back in time to one of the most iconic eras of music for the night out you have been dreaming of – put your hands together and get into the groove as our live band Electric Dreams perform over two dozen chart-topping anthems from Wham!, The Weather Girls, Culture Club, Rick Astley, Madonna, Duran Duran, Soft Cell, The Human League, A-Ha, Tears for Fears and more.

We will be heading down the Atlanta Highway, so bring your jukebox money and get ready to Jitterbug!

The ultimate 80s night out, so come dressed to impress as we spin you around and around for a night to remember.

Blending pop and soft rock, the show includes Girls Just Wanna Have Fun, The Edge of Heaven, Tainted Love, Love Shack, Living on a Prayer, The Final Countdown, Don’t You Want Me?, Relax, Never Gonna Give You Up, It’s Raining Men, Rio. . . the list goes on.

With our sensational cast and live band, this is just what the doctor ordered.

This is 80s Live!

Touring the nation, tickets on sale now!

This is a tribute show and is in no way affiliated with any original artists/estates/management companies or similar shows. Promoter reserves the right to alter the programme.

title: NW1 10th Anniversary Show
description:
NW1 Theatre School Celebrates 10 Years with Spectacular Anniversary Show at the Blackpool Grand Theatre.

NW1 Theatre School is proud to celebrate its 10 Year Anniversary with a spectacular celebration show bringing together all branches of the school for the very first time on one stage.

The special anniversary performances will take place at the iconic Blackpool Grand Theatre, marking a major milestone for the school and showcasing a decade of talent, creativity, and dedication to performing arts training.

The anniversary show promises an exciting, high-energy programme featuring young performers, celebrating everything NW1 Theatre School believes in — confidence, passion, teamwork, and outstanding performance.

This production reflects the journey of the school over the past ten years and the bright future ahead.

Founded with a mission to inspire young performers and nurture talent in a supportive, professional environment, NW1 Theatre School has grown into a thriving creative community.

This anniversary event is not only a celebration of past achievements, but a thank-you to the students, families, teachers, and supporters who have been part of the journey.

This is set to be a joyful, emotional, and truly memorable event — a celebration of ten years of dreams, dedication, and stage magic.

title: The Tiger Who Came To Tea
description:
The Tiger Who Came To Tea

Save this performance

Tue 14 Jul

– Wed 15 Jul

4:30pm | 1:30pm

£17

*excludes any collection or delivery fees.

Relaxed ‘Chilled’ Performance*: Wed 15 July 1:30PM

This would include customers with dementia, anxiety, Tourette’s, bowel and bladder conditions, an autism spectrum condition, or a learning disability. Even a person’s first experience of a theatre. There will be a few technical adjustments made to the performance. They are not suitable for customers with sensory sensitivities.

Recommended for ages 3+

Running time: 55 minutes (no interval)

A musical play adapted and directed by DAVID WOOD

Based on the book by JUDITH KERR

Direct from the West End, the Olivier Award nominated smash hit show, The Tiger Who Came to Tea returns on tour.

The doorbell rings just as Sophie and her mummy are sitting down to tea.

Who could it possibly be?

What they certainly don’t expect to see at the door is a big, stripy tiger!

Join the tea-guzzling tiger in this delightful family show; packed with oodles of magic, sing-a-long songs and clumsy chaos.

Don’t miss this stunning stage adaptation of the classic tale of teatime mayhem… expect to be surprised!

title: Theatre Heritage Tour – Grand Opulence (July)
description:
Grand Opulence Tour – Discover the theatres history, front-of-house Grandeur and Opulence.

(Tour includes Stalls, Dress Circle, Walkway, Royal Box & Stage Door)

There is no theatre quite like The Grand. The published descriptions in 1894 said so, and contemporary theatregoers agree.

This is renowned architect Frank Matcham’s masterpiece theatre, with a long and lively history.

Why not explore our YouTube video with Hayley Kay who explored the theatre on a Heritage Tour with one of our volunteers.

Travel from 1894 to the present day and learn more about our theatre architect Frank Matcham and his masterpiece that recently celebrated 125 Years. Watch here.

Cant make this date? See all available tour dates HERE

title: The Rocket Man
description:
A Tribute to Sir Elton John

Pack your bags, strap yourself in, zero hour 7.30pm, for a night like no other as we celebrate Sir Elton John!

The Rocket Man is the world’s favourite celebration to a musical icon, playing to audiences all around the world and we are delighted to announce our UK tour for 2025.

So, catch a star if you can, and wish for something special as we ask you, are you ready for love?

No one else recreates the flamboyant megastar with as much vigour and brilliance.

Join us as The Rocket Man and our amazing live band take you down the Yellow Brick Road with two hours of glorious Elton hits, including, _Saturday Night’s Alright, Crocodile Rock, I Guess That’s Why They Call it the Blues, Daniel, I’m Still Standing, Philadelphia Freedom, Your Song_ and many, many more.

With dazzling costumes, stunning vocals and sensational piano solos, we take you on a journey through Elton’s life and career, the highs and the lows with many a laugh brought to life, live on stage. This show has it all!

So, if it gets to seven o’clock and you wanna rock, book your tickets now!

The Rocket Man – a magical night in tribute to Sir Elton John

UK Tour Tickets on sale now. Don’t miss out!

This is a tribute show and is no way affiliated with any original artists/estates/management companies or similar shows.

title: Going Viral: Silver Surfers vs Tiktok Teens
description:
Get ready for big Northern laughs in Going Viral: Silver Surfers vs TikTok Teens!

THIS SHOW IS PERFORMED IN BLACKPOOL GRAND THEATRE STUDIO

Daisy House is meant to be a quiet retirement home, but behind its worn sofas is a lively, mischievous community.

When sharp-tongued teenager Bea arrives through a “care in the community” scheme, she dismisses both the place and its residents.

Meanwhile, Kyle, a self-styled journalist, charms his way inside while hiding a more troubling motive.

He aims to sabotage, and ultimately sell their home.

Their fightback is chaotic, heartfelt, and hilarious. Expect singing, gloriously bad dancing and Hester’s unforgettable and wildly unconventional game of ‘Finger Bingo.’

Surprisingly, their antics catapult them to viral fame, turning them into unlikely TikTok sensations.

Through misunderstandings, reunions, and bold reinvention, they prove it’s never too late to start again.

Blending sharp humour with emotional depth, this uplifting, brand new comedy, celebrates resilience, connection, and chosen family, showing that growing old doesn’t mean growing quiet.

title: An Evening with Jimmy Tarbuck
description:
Jimmy Tarbuck: “Laughter is the only drug I’ve ever needed”

JIMMY TARBUCK OBE, one of the most popular household names from the golden era of British stand up, is back with a bang:

The much-loved entertainer is on tour through the spring and summer 2026 with his solo show ‘An Evening with Jimmy Tarbuck’ which stops off at some of his favourite towns and venues in the UK. And he can’t wait.

Jimmy says:

“It’s been great, and I love getting on stage, where I belong. Now I am really looking forward to visiting the towns and cities where I learned my craft and built my fanbase. The crowds are always on great form and always ready to laugh. And laughter is the only drug I’ve ever needed!”

‘An Evening with Jimmy Tarbuck’ will see the acclaimed comedian and raconteur reflecting on a remarkable life in showbusiness, the seeds of which were sown in childhood.

Jimmy will present a hugely entertaining mix of anecdotes and jokes, including recollections of his many years presenting Sunday Night at the London Palladium which shot him to fame in 1963.

There will also be stories from Jimmy’s childhood, growing up in Liverpool where he was classmates – and good mates – with John Lennon.

And of course, his golfing life, which has proved to be a rich source of entertainment and celebrity both on and off the course.

Jimmy’s incredible career has taken him around the world, mixing and befriending the biggest stars in entertainment and sport: he’s played golf with Arnold Palmer, football with Bobby Moore, sang with Tom Jones, partied with Parky and Lynchy, drank with Frank (Sinatra) and sipped champagne with Cilla; and he treasures his time working with the legendary Judy Garland, who affectionately called him her ‘Little Man’. Fans will be treated to all these anecdotes and more, by one of our true national treasures.

If you love Entertainment, see what else we have coming to Blackpool Grand Theatre this season HERE

Estimated run time: 2 hrs 0 mins

title: 9 to 5 The Musical
description:
Get ready to clock in for a night of laughter and iconic songs!

Join us for the ultimate feel-good musical comedy as 9 to 5 The Musical bursts onto the stage with sass, style, and a whole lot of Dolly sparkle!

Featuring an irresistible score by country music legend Dolly Parton, this hit show follows three office workers who’ve had enough of their overbearing, chauvinistic boss.

Starring Jessica Martin (Me and My Girl, Jerry’s Girls, Menier Chocolate Factory) as Roz, Karla Tracey (Irish Affair, A love Story for All Time) as Doralee, Judy played by Kayla Carter (Military Wives, York Theatre Royal), Tim Rogers (West Side Story, West End & UK Tour) as Hart and Jade Marvin (Starlight Express, Troubadour Wembley Park Theatre) as Violet.

When a wild idea turns into a daring plan for revenge, chaos, comedy, and sisterhood take centre stage.

Inspired by the much-loved 1980s film, 9 to 5 The Musical is a joyful story about friendship, courage, and standing up for what’s right, all set to toe-tapping tunes you’ll be humming long after the curtain falls.

Lively, empowering, and outrageously funny, this is one night at the theatre you won’t want to miss!

Attending a Matinee performance?

Why not make your visit even more special, indulge in a pre-show Afternoon Tea served in the elegant Dress Circle Bar at 12pm. Enjoy a selection of delicious treats, available for just £18 per person or £24 with Prosecco.

Pre-booking is essential, spaces are limited, so reserve your spot today by booking here or calling our Box Office on 01253 290 190

Inspired by the much-loved 1980s film, 9 to 5 The Musical is a joyful story about friendship, courage, and standing up for what’s right, all set to toe-tapping tunes you’ll be humming long after the curtain falls.

Lively, empowering, and outrageously funny, this is one night at the theatre you won’t want to miss!

The Smash-Hit Cliff Richard Musical – Summer Holiday! Stage adaptation by Michael Gyngell and Mark Haddigan

If summer had a soundtrack, it would sound a lot like Summer Holiday.

Following the smash-hit success of last year’s musical Grease, this year Blackpool Grand Theatre joins forces with the world-famous Sheffield Crucible Theatre to bring a major new musical to the stage – this time with the joyous, sun-soaked, Cliff Richard hit-filled “Summer Holiday”.

The casting includes Fanta Barrie as Barbara, Jim Duah (Good Golly Miss Molly) as Edwin, Ava Duncan (A Bit of Roll Play) as Ensemble, Charlie Hale (Come From Away) as Swing, Nis Raza Hamilton (The Railway Children) as Angie, Robin Harris (Much Ado About Nothing) as Steve, Matthew James Hinchliffe (The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe) as Al, Damian Humbley as Jerry, George Jones (Witness for the Prosecution) as Don, Elliot Mackenzie (The Curious Case of Benjamin Button) as Cyril, Jane McCarry (Still Game) as Stella, Isaac Savage as Ensemble, Tolia Uwalaka (Wham! The Show) as Swing and Trudy Ward (Gypsy) as Mimsie.

Bursting with classic feel-good hits from the golden age of 60s pop, the show features favourites made famous by Cliff Richard and the era’s biggest stars, including Summer Holiday, Bachelor Boy, Move It, Dancing Shoes, The Young Ones, In the Country and more. It’s a soundtrack packed with energy, nostalgia and irresistible summer vibes.

There’s no better place to take this trip than Blackpool – the UK’s most loved seaside escape and the spiritual home of the Great British summer holiday. The journey, the music, the summer of a lifetime – climb aboard and enjoy this incredible ride.

The full creative team are: Co-Directors Elizabeth Newman and Ben Occhipinti, Set and Costume Designer Amanda Stoodley, Musical Director Richard Reeday, Movement Director Lesley Hutchison, Lighting Designer Rory Beaton, Sound Designer Tom Marshall, Associate Director Eilidh Gibson, and Casting Director Arthur Carrington CDG.

A Blackpool Grand Theatre and Sheffield Theatres co-production.

Stage adaptation by Michael Gyngell and Mark Haddigan

Based on the film Summer Holiday, directed by Peter Yates, screenplay by Ronald Cass and Peter Myers and by special arrangement with StudioCanal

Orchestrations by Keith Strachan

Presented by arrangement with Music Theatre International on behalf of Josef Weinberger Limited.

Attending a Matinee performance?

Why not make your visit even more special, indulge in a pre-show Afternoon Tea served in the elegant Dress Circle Bar at 12pm. Enjoy a selection of delicious treats, available for just £18 per person or £24 with Prosecco.

title: Afternoon Tea – August 2026
description:
Step into The Dress Circle Bar for a delightful Afternoon Tea. Savor delicious treats and fine teas while seated in The Dress Circle Bar.

Afternoon tea on stands and served to each table.

Cucumber sandwiches

Cheese and pickle sandwiches

Honey roasted ham and wholegrain mustard sandwiches

Handmade sausage rolls

Pork Pies

Selection of quiches

Fruit scones

Victoria sponge cake

Macaroons

Tea and coffee and vintage teacups and saucers

Vegan/vegetarian option available on request.

Book your tickets now and step into the enchanting world of Blackpool Grand Theatre!

Why not make your afternoon extra special by adding a glass of Fizz for an extra £6pp.

title: Joseph and The Amazing Technicolor Dreamcoat
description:
ANY DREAM WILL DO! Get ready for a dazzling burst of colour, music and feel-good energy as Joseph and the Amazing Technicolor Dreamcoat comes to Blackpool Grand Theatre this August!

Presented by the talented team behind last year’s incredible The Wind in the Willows, this spectacular Summer Youth Production brings fresh energy and big ambition to one of the world’s most beloved musicals.

The timeless story of Joseph, his jealous brothers and a coat like no other is brought to life with unforgettable songs by Tim Rice and Andrew Lloyd Webber. From the show-stopping “Any Dream Will Do” to the powerful “Close Every Door” and the toe-tapping fun of “Go, Go, Go Joseph” and “Benjamin Calypso”, every moment is packed with music you’ll know and love.

Bursting with colour, humour and heart, this vibrant production showcases an exceptional young cast delivering big voices, bold storytelling and pure theatrical magic.

A spectacular, family-friendly musical adventure you won’t want to miss!

A BLACKPOOL GRAND THEATRE SUMMER YOUTH PRODUCTION

™2007 LWE Ltd
